title: Cryptominer Deployment Indicators
description: Detects indicators of cryptocurrency mining software deployment on Windows systems.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*stratum+tcp*' or 'Command Line' like '*xmrig*' or 'Command Line' like '*minergate*' or 'Command Line' like '*nicehash*' or 'Command Line' like '*hashrate*')))

tests.test_name: FreeBSD/macOS/Linux - Simulate CPU Load with Yes
Windows - Simulate CPU Load with PowerShell
